data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective green and orange neon accents. Split composition: LEFT shows lines of code on a dark editor with syntax highlighting in green and amber, RIGHT shows a glowing 3D wireframe geometric shape (icosahedron or torus knot) rotating in a dark viewport. A faint connection line links a code variable to the 3D object. Dramatic shadows, cyberpunk aesthetic, technical and artistic.
